rationale: The cited paper appears as a single supporting reference when the authors discuss the possibility of positive spillovers from promoted comics to non-promoted comics. In the citing paper, this is a brief background justification rather than a dependency: the authors do not reuse the cited paper's structural framework, estimation approach, or measurements. The spillover modeling in the citing study is developed from its own coviewing-based similarity construction and episode-level specification, so the citation functions as an illustrative prior example.
